{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323184724C68E00537999A3BEBF28"}"},"total":57},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7608169066529342270","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"寒门科考文，没有穿越者的浮夸，由微末到朝臣，由寒门到书香，由一人到白头，很不错的古科举文，有兴趣的不妨一看。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771417195,"group_id":"7539470262505327640","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱看书，由少年到中年，由书本到电子，一切都在变，唯有爱好没变","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1mwHULANg82Wg/6AzxEHho=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d85d35a8fb8b4789afc1bcbd742ab297~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790220&x-signature=pr0wYvgt4LIOdCSHJWtaFZtQkYo%3D","user_id":"105982440244990","user_name":"爱吃潘秋梅的慕宸汐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"105982440244990","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7539470262505327640","book_info":{"abstract":"现代小伙一朝穿越，成了农家小子，祖上世代务农为生。
别人穿越都有金手指，有系统，再一看自己，不仅啥也没有，还是这个时代最底层的人。
想搞发明改变这个时代，奈何自己是个动手废材。
想靠理学独步天下，好吧，啥也不会……
唉，还是认清现实吧。

":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7605190897660920638","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"虽然故事篇幅较短，剧情也相对简单，既没有什么朝堂争斗和尔虞我诈的烦恼，也没有什么智计天下和惊心动魄的争端，但是就莫名让人看的很安心，也许就是因为故事里的那份平静吧。
所以，大家别因为评分较低就断言不好，只是作者缩减了一些故事过程，剧情起伏较小，显得没有那么饱满而已。
另外，要是段落划分能再细致些就好，不然听书时太长一段，会让人有点窒息。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770724627,"group_id":"7539470262505327640","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2Cg7GJG+C9f9uQUPA48l+s=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a4d411fcfb5d4153a77b3878bca2b814~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795919&x-signature=O%2BAqDToSR2M3s3eRiacKe0s7yEE%3D","user_id":"6666223328","user_name":"🉐鹿梦鱼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"6666223328","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7539470262505327640","book_info":{"abstract":"现代小伙一朝穿越，成了农家小子，祖上世代务农为生。
